title: lonchocarpus pluvialis
intro: Lonchocarpus pluvialis is a plant species, commonly known as the "rain tree", that belongs to the family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Lonchocarpus pluvialis include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include the ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Lonchocarpus pluvialis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tincture form, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
